title: ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Machete 15.5 Inch Serrated Blade Paracord Handle
description:
Blaze trails while you're hunting or camping with the ASR Outdoor 15.5" Machete with nylon sheath. Chops like an axe. Cuts like a razor; compact and sturdy. This fixed blade machete features a very strong and sturdy full tang construction from a single piece of forged stainless steel, finished in a black anodized finish. The machete has a jungle style recurved zigzag serrated blade; used for sawing limbs when hacking it won't cut it down. The overall length of the machete is 15.5" while the length of the blade is 9.5" and 3mm thick. The ergonomic curved handle fits nicely in hand and is wrapped with black 550 survival paracord which can be useful in an emergency situation

ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Machete 15.5 Inch Serrated Blade Paracord Handle

Blaze trails while you're hunting or camping with the ASR Outdoor 15.5" Machete with nylon sheath.

Chops like an axe. Cuts like a razor; compact and sturdy.

Key Features

  • Light weight full tang machete one-piece construction with recurved blade and serrated spine
  • Overall Length: 15.5 inches; Blade Length: 9.5 inches; Blade Thickness: 3mm; Ideal backpacking machete for blazing trails through the forest
  • Ergonomic paracord wrapped handle; recurved fixed blade; zigzag serrated spine; nylon sheath included
  • Ideal for camping and outdoor adventures but also practical around the house or out in the field for day to day bushwacking
  • Lanyard Hole and Black Fitted Nylon Sheath

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO15MSH-2
  • UPC: 184901982327
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 15.5 in

This fixed blade machete features a very strong and sturdy full tang construction from a single piece of forged stainless steel, finished in a black anodized finish. The machete has a jungle style recurved zigzag serrated blade; used for sawing limbs when hacking it won't cut it down.

The overall length of the machete is 15.5" while the length of the blade is 9.5" and 3mm thick. The ergonomic curved handle fits nicely in hand and is wrapped with black 550 survival paracord which can be useful in an emergency situation.

The blade comes with a black fitted nylon sheath with hanging hook and loop belt fastener, and there's also a lanyard hole with lanyard for easy carrying when not in use.
